reference: Hello, I think you need an evaluation in the form of complete blood counts, electrocardiogram, chest X-ray, and pulmonary function tests. Cold air can lead to bronchospasm and present with difficulty in breathing. You can take the Ventolin inhaler in case you experience wheezing and difficulty in breathing. I hope this helps.
text: I think you need an evaluation in the form of complete blood counts, electrocardiogram, chest X-ray, and pulmonary function tests.
